notes: Frozen before A0/A64 outputs. MMD SE is the SD of 2,000 no-replacement 64v64 permutations of the 128 public human-floor embeddings (observed 0.0006077874). AUC SE 0.052 is the conservative balanced n=64 per-class null approximation. Human repetition is 12/64 on the frozen human-eval panel. Repetition effect is the preregistered distance from the non-inferiority boundary used by the prospective simulation, not a claim that human repetition should be minimized.
